City Circus Athens

★★★☆☆
🍸 Rooftop Bar
from €40 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Award-winning hostel with great rooftop and social events. Mix of dorms and private rooms.

Who Should Consider City Circus Athens

City Circus Athens is a 3-star budget price-signal hotel in Exarchia, with no Acropolis-view signal in the current dataset and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for backpackers, social, budget.

  • Compare the area on the Exarchia hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

  • Great atmosphere
  • Rooftop bar
  • Social events

✗ Cons

  • Can be loud

Location

Located in Exarchia, 20 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 20 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro
